name: flesh_raptor.live_equipment_frustration_comparison_mcw
description: Bounded live comparison row: staged open-field flesh raptor records new circling pressure against the old-feeling stab/flee frustration bar, including player-message combat/frustration/counterplay evidence and equipment-damage message capture when present.

steps.label: post_load_raptor_open_field_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: staged flesh-raptor open-field fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_raptor_open_field
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected noon turn before live flesh-raptor window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local noon before open-field raptor skirmish window

steps.label: audit_saved_flesh_raptor_before_open_field
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required live-scenario raptor footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: one hostile flesh raptor starts five tiles east at skirmish range

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_raptor_open_field
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live raptor window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_raptor_comparison_skirmish_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: longer bounded comparison window shows player-facing flesh-raptor impale and bleeding/consequence text while debug logs record current circling/swoop mechanics; equipment-damage proof is checked in the following message-history screen
steps.abort_reason: after-window screenshot/OCR did not capture basic player-facing flesh-raptor impale and bleeding/consequence text for the old-feeling comparison row

steps.label: open_message_history_after_raptor_comparison_window
steps.abort_reason: message-history screenshot/OCR did not capture flesh-raptor impale plus equipment-damage cut and bleeding/consequence text after the bounded comparison window
steps.expected_visible_fact: message history exposes player-facing old-feeling frustration evidence from the bounded window: flesh-raptor impale text, an equipment-damage cut line, and bleeding/consequence text

steps.label: audit_flesh_raptor_comparison_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked current-build orbit/swoop/melee metrics for old-feeling comparison row
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the current build supplies non-old-feeling circling/swoop metrics plus combat-result frustration counters for comparison review

evidence_contract.claim: a staged live flesh raptor in current build can be compared against the old stab/flee frustration bar because the row captures current circling/swoop metrics, concrete combat outcomes, and screenshot/OCR player-facing impale, equipment-damage, and bleeding/consequence messages from the same bounded window
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for old-feeling equipment/frustration comparison
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No equipment-damage tuning changes here. Equipment damage is captured as screenshot/OCR player-facing evidence; hit/miss/armor-absorb and target HP are captured through debug melee_event counters. This row is a bounded comparison aid, not proof of natural random discovery.
